channel.title: The Sentinel Review — National Security Feed
channel.description: Automated national security news aggregation. Updated every 2 hours.

item.title: 🌍 Israel delivers Tamir interceptors to US Marine Corps for MRIC program | Breaking Defense
item.description: The MRIC centers around Israel’s famed Iron Dome and uses truck-mounted Iron Dome launcher with Tamir interceptors.

item.title: ⚛️ New Nuclear Bunker Buster Bomb Plans Revealed | The War Zone
item.description: There has been talk for decades about a true successor to the specialized deep bunker-busting B61-11 nuclear bomb. The post New Nuclear Bunker Buster Bomb Plans Revealed appeared first on The War Zone.

item.title: 🌍 The IEA’s Fatih Birol on ‘the greatest energy security threat in history’ | Atlantic Council
item.description: The war in Iran continues with no clear end in sight, fueling economic turbulence and concerns of a global energy crisis. International Energy Agency Executive Director Fatih Birol spoke at an AC Front Page event on April 13th, and argued the conflict is the greatest energy…

item.title: 🌍 White House Claims Ceasefire Means No Congressional Approval Needed For Iran War… Yet | The War Zone
item.description: The White House stance on seeking permission to continue the war comes on the deadline for Congressional action. The post White House Claims Ceasefire Means No Congressional Approval Needed For Iran War… Yet appeared first on The War Zone.

item.title: 🔐 Army plans fast follow-up to AI cyber wargame with industry: Officials | Breaking Defense
item.description: After exploring a Pacific-war scenario with cybersecurity executives from 14 tech firms, the Army wants to fast-track new AI tools — and thrash out new policy to allow more autonomy for AI “agents.”

item.title: 📍 Australia enlists Northrop Grumman for solid rocket motor production | Breaking Defense
item.description: It will also work with DefendTex, Black Sky Industries and Anduril Australia to explore novel manufacturing methods

item.title: 🌍 Five “Blockades” and One Legal Problem: Naval Enforcement in the U.S.–Iran Conflict | Just Security
item.description: Former U.S. Navy Commander, JAGC Mark Nevitt clarifies the 5 "blockades" in the U.S.-Iran conflict and the different legal issues and operational risks at stake. The post Five “Blockades” and One Legal Problem: Naval Enforcement in the U.S.–Iran Conflict appeared first on Just…

item.title: 🏛️ New PAE Marine Corps will put ‘jet fuel’ on Project Dynamis | Breaking Defense
item.description: The creation of a Corps-wide Portfolio Acquisition Executive will bridge the valley of death when it comes to capabilities being tested as part of Project Dynamis.

item.title: 🌍 Israel’s Slow War on the West Bank | Foreign Policy
item.description: Israeli leaders seem increasingly comfortable with the collapse of the Palestinian Authority.

item.title: 🏛️ 7 AI firms cleared to provide tools for classified Pentagon networks | Defense One
item.description: The wide variety—which does not include Anthropic—is intended to prevent AI-vendor lock.

item.title: 📍 Space Force wraps decades-long GPS upgrade—and the next one is on tap | Defense One
item.description: A last-minute rocket swap shows agility in pursuit of faster launches.

item.title: 🕵️ Synthesized Command & Control: A new way human choices can guide AI warfighting | Breaking Defense
item.description: Two AI experts propose a new way to train artificial intelligence for warfighters.

item.title: 📍 What can save Mali from collapse? | Atlantic Council
item.description: The security situation in Mali is becoming critical in the wake of a large-scale, coordinated series of attacks across multiple cities on April 25. The post What can save Mali from collapse? appeared first on Atlantic Council.

item.title: 🌏 Developing an Africa-focused tech agenda for the United States to outcompete China | Atlantic Council
item.description: The competition between the US and China is playing out in the tech sector and one of the world's fastest-growing markets—the African continent. What can US companies and the US government do to foster mutually beneficial partnerships that are attractive to African consumers and…

item.title: 🏛️ Pentagon clears 8 tech firms to deploy their AI on its classified networks | Breaking Defense
item.description: The Defense Department has made agreements with Amazon Web Services, Google, Microsoft, NVIDIA, OpenAI, SpaceX, and Reflection, according to an announcement this morning, with an eighth, Oracle, added just hours later.

item.title: 🌏 US Army tests fresh drones, 3D printers at ‘Balikatan’ drill in the Philippines | Defense News
item.description: In addition, the lab was testing a containerized solar-panel micro grid to generate electricity, a quieter alternative to diesel generators.

item.title: 🏛️ The sights of Modern Day Marine 2026 | Breaking Defense
item.description: Check out a selection of photos from the Modern Day Marine show floor.

item.title: 🌏 The Deeper Pattern Behind China’s Military Purges | Foreign Policy
item.description: Xi’s new commanders are the men his last generals blocked.

item.title: 🌍 Why Trump Might Come to Regret the Iran War | Foreign Policy
item.description: He hoped it would be transformational; instead, it’s just one more round in the conflict.

item.title: 🔐 Former head of ‘Pentagon’s think tank’ joins Anthropic | Defense One
item.description: The strategy expert calls adaptation to AI a "civilizational" challenge.

item.title: 🌍 At the 60-Day Mark, the Iran War is Triply Illegal | Just Security
item.description: Under the War Powers Resolution, Trump must now terminate the hostilities against Iran he began two months ago. He seems set against doing so. The post At the 60-Day Mark, the Iran War is Triply Illegal appeared first on Just Security.

item.title: 🌍 The Price of Peace With Iran | Foreign Affairs
item.description: Washington must be willing to make uncomfortable concessions.

item.title: 📍 Lt. Gen. Doug Schiess tapped as 3rd Space Force chief | Breaking Defense
item.description: Lt. Gen. Doug Schiess will inherit a much larger Space Force, in both budget and end strength, than his predecessor Gen. Chance Saltzman.

item.title: 📍 How to Acknowledge Forced Marriage as a Standalone Crime in the Draft Crimes Against Humanity Treaty | Just Security
item.description: Adding forced marriage to the draft Crimes Against Humanity Convention would codify a distinct international crime, reflect its severe harms, and improve legal clarity. The post How to Acknowledge Forced Marriage as a Standalone Crime in the Draft Crimes Against Humanity Treaty…

item.title: 🌍 US Navy turns to AI firm Domino for options to counter Iranian mines | Defense News
item.description: The core of Domino’s pitch - and the Navy’s wager - is speed.

item.title: 📍 Legal Foundations of Honorable Military Service | Just Security
item.description: As former judge advocates, it was our responsibility while on active duty to advise on the legal demands of and limits on senior officers’ authority and responsibility. The post Legal Foundations of Honorable Military Service appeared first on Just Security.

item.title: 🏴 Europe needs Ukraine as it looks to counter growing Russian threat | Atlantic Council
item.description: More than a year since Trump returned to the White House, it is clear that Europe needs to develop its own strategic vision for the continent’s defense. It is equally apparent that Ukraine must be central to this vision, writes Zahar Hryniv. The post Europe needs Ukraine as it…

item.title: 📍 The Real Meaning of the UAE’s OPEC Exit | Foreign Policy
item.description: The geopolitical realignment goes much deeper than just oil markets.

item.title: 📍 Colombia’s Anti-Fossil Fuel Conference | Foreign Policy
item.description: The country is trying to push for a green transition despite gridlock at U.N. climate talks.

item.title: 🌍 Collection: Iran, Israel and the United States at War (2025-2026 Operations) | Just Security
item.description: Experts analyze the US-Israel Iran military conflicts - covering nuclear diplomacy; strategic, security, and regional implications; and domestic and international law. The post Collection: Iran, Israel and the United States at War (2025-2026 Operations) appeared first on Just…
